headline: Veralto Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
summary: VLTO tops Q1 estimates with 12.6% y/y EPS growth and 6.8% y/y revenue increase, driven by strong Water Quality performance and solid cash flow generation.

headline: Veralto (VLTO) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: With me today are Jennifer Honeycutt, our President and Chief Executive Officer; and Sameer Ralhan, our Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer.  Today's call is simultaneously being webcast.
